name: python310-fstring-backslash
description: Python 3.10 f-string backslash fix: pre-compute any expression containing backslash escapes into a variable before the f-string; use that variable inside the f-string. Example: prompt_escaped = s.replace('"', '\"') then f'{prompt_escaped}'

content: hooks.json on WSL/Linux requires python3 not python as the command. All hook commands must use 'python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/...' for cross-platform WSL compatibility.
